query: SELECT o.id, o.name, COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as project_count FROM organizations o LEFT JOIN clients c ON o.id = c.ownerId LEFT JOIN projects p ON c.id = p.clientId WHERE o.id = 240001 GROUP BY o.id, o.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zhFTwZdMBa685Cr.4d37142b48ab --database FiS5WF2NaftJTm6fu3BYQb --execute SELECT o.id, o.name, COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as project_count FROM organizations o LEFT JOIN clients c ON o.id = c.ownerId LEFT JOIN projects p ON c.id = p.clientId WHERE o.id = 240001 GROUP BY o.id, o.name;
